summary: Kang Hyunwoo joins forces with Jung-Gu and Tang to explore the multi-layered Loton's Dungeon. As they navigate the floors and defeat various guards, Hyunwoo showcases his impressive skills and pet-assisted buffs. Afterward, the group attempts to recruit Hyunwoo into their guild, 'New World,' and while he remains non-committal about joining immediately, he promises to choose their guild should he ever decide to sign up.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo meets Jung-Gu and Tang to begin exploring Loton's Dungeon.
The party battles through multiple floors of guards, with Hyunwoo utilizing powerful buffs and combat skills.
Jung-Gu and Tang attempt to recruit Hyunwoo into the New World guild, securing a promise for his future membership.
